app.title: VRCFlow
settings.title: Settings
settings.providerDisclaimer: All providers are third-party services unaffiliated with this software. All charges and fees are collected by the respective provider. For support, please contact your provider directly.
settings.apiKeyRequired: Please set your {{provider}} API Key in Settings to get started.
settings.aliyunDesc: Real-time ASR + translation via DashScope gummy-chat-v1. Low latency, billed by audio duration.
settings.getApiKeyAliyun: Get API Key from Alibaba Cloud Bailian
settings.aliyunRegionNote: DashScope is recommended for users in mainland China only. Alibaba Cloud registration requires a Chinese phone number.
settings.aliyunBillingNote: ASR and translation are billed separately (2x audio duration). Only billed while speaking.
settings.openrouterDesc: Access multiple audio-capable LLMs via OpenRouter. Transcription + translation via tool calling.
settings.openrouterPrepaid: OpenRouter requires prepaid credits to use.
settings.openrouterRegionNote: Some models have regional restrictions. Gemini is unavailable in China (including Hong Kong). Please use DashScope instead.
settings.costEstimateNote: Estimates assume ~1,500 audio tokens per minute of speech and ~100 output tokens per request. Actual costs may vary.
settings.processingTimeoutDesc: Discard results if processing takes longer than this. Increase if you experience frequent timeouts.
settings.speechPadMsDesc: How long to wait after silence before ending a speech segment. Increase if your sentences are being split too early.
help.title: Help
help.dualBilling: ASR and translation are billed separately, so actual cost is doubled:
help.billingNote: You are only charged while speaking. Even after pressing "Start", no fees are incurred as long as you remain silent.
help.freeQuota: New DashScope users get 10 hours of free quota. Since VRCFlow consumes quota at 2x rate (ASR + translation), you effectively get about 5 hours of free usage.
dashboard.title: Dashboard
history.title: History
label.speaker: Speaker
tutorial.title: Getting Started
tutorial.welcome: Welcome to VRCFlow! This is a real-time voice translation tool that transcribes and translates your speech and sends it to VRChat's chatbox. Let's get you set up quickly.
tutorial.step1Desc: Click the language switcher in the top-right corner to choose your preferred interface language (Chinese / English / Japanese).
tutorial.step2Desc: Open Settings → General to set the source language (the language you speak) and target language (the language to translate into).
tutorial.step3Desc: Go to Settings → Provider to select your translation service. The two providers target different audiences:
tutorial.dashscopeAudience: Recommended for users in mainland China
tutorial.dashscopeDetail: Aliyun DashScope with gummy-chat-v1 model. Low-latency WebSocket real-time transcription and translation, billed by audio duration, with free quota for new users. Requires a Chinese phone number to register.
tutorial.openrouterDetail: OpenRouter aggregation platform with multiple audio-capable LLMs (Voxtral, Gemini, etc.). Supports various payment methods, requires prepaid credits. Some models unavailable in China.
tutorial.step4Desc: Enter your API key in the corresponding provider section. Follow the links on the page to obtain one from the provider's website.
tutorial.step5Desc: If using OpenRouter, choose your preferred model from the list and click details to see pricing and features. DashScope uses a fixed model and requires no extra selection.
tutorial.featureMicDesc: Captures your microphone audio, translates in real-time and sends to VRChat chatbox.
tutorial.featureSpeakerDesc: Captures system/speaker audio (others' voices) and displays the translation on screen.
tutorial.featureOverlayDesc: Displays translation subtitles in your VR headset. Enable in General settings.
tutorial.featureOscDesc: Automatically sends mic translation results to VRChat chatbox via OSC, default port 9000.
tutorial.ready: All set! Click the button below to start using VRCFlow.
